## What does this change?

<!-- Bug fix / docs / TagKit / STEP. If it changes the paradigm's observable
     semantics, it needs an Accepted STEP first — see CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m unittest tests.test_tagkit`
- [ ] If this changes observable TOP semantics, a STEP is linked and Cleared
- [ ] Spec / docs updated where needed
- [ ] I agree to the contribution licenses (Apache-2.0 for code, CC-BY-4.0 for spec/STEPs)
